briefdescription.para: This function tests the functioning of the TRNG in DRNG mode.
This function prints specified number of bytes from an address.

parameterdescription.para: is start address from where to print.
is size of buffer pointed by Src.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the Trngpsx driver example.

This example demonstrates use of instantiate, reseed, generate functionalities while generating random number using DRNG mode and runs DRBG,Health tests for all the instances i.e XTrngpsx_PreOperationalSelfTests.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 kpt 01/10/23 First release yog 08/04/23 Removed support for PKI instances 1.01 ng 09/04/23 Added SDT support 1.2 kpt 01/09/24 Updated option for non-blocking trng reseed 1.6 hae 01/06/26 Fixed doxygen warnings
